prompt: Customer asks: The reset link says it has expired.
completion: Reset links expire for security reasons. Please go back to the sign-in page, click “Forgot password” again, and use the most recent email you receive. If you continue to see errors, contact support with your workspace name and login email.

prompt: Customer asks: Can you move my billing from monthly to annual?
completion: Yes. To move from monthly to annual, go to Settings → Billing and choose an annual plan. The new term and pricing will start at your next renewal. If you need the change to take effect sooner, contact support or your account manager.

prompt: Customer asks: I want to cancel at the end of my current billing period, not immediately.
completion: You can cancel now and keep access until the end of your current billing period. Go to Settings → Billing, click “Cancel plan,” and confirm. Your workspace will switch to read-only mode after the billing period ends.

prompt: Customer asks: Our company changed its legal name. How do I update invoices?
completion: Please update your company name under Settings → Billing → Company details. Future invoices will show the new legal name. If you need past invoices updated, contact support with the invoice numbers you want corrected.

prompt: Customer asks: Can I limit which teammates can access Billing settings?
completion: Yes. Only Admins can see and change billing settings. To limit access, assign the Admin role only to those who should manage billing and keep other teammates as Agents or Viewers.

prompt: Customer asks: Do you send alerts if a payment fails?
completion: Yes. When a payment fails, we send an email to the billing contact address and show a banner inside the app. Please update your card details under Settings → Billing and retry the payment.

prompt: Customer asks: Can I restrict ticket access by team?
completion: Yes. You can create separate queues and use roles and permissions so that certain teams only see tickets assigned to their queues. Configure this under Settings → Queues and Team roles.

prompt: Customer asks: How do I see when my subscription renews?
completion: You can see your next renewal date at the top of the Settings → Billing page, along with your current plan and seat count.

prompt: Customer asks: We missed the 14-day refund window by a few days. Can you still help?
completion: Our standard refund window for annual plans is 14 days from the first payment. If you just missed the window, contact support with your workspace name and billing email. Our billing team will review your case and let you know what is possible.

prompt: Customer asks: How do I contact AcornDesk support directly?
completion: You can contact AcornDesk support using the in-app chat widget or by emailing support@acorndesk.example. Please include your workspace name and a brief description of the issue so we can help quickly.
